title: State of the art on proton-boron fusion for electricity generation
description: Survey of proton–boron-11 (p–¹¹B) fusion paths aimed at clean electricity generation (mid-2026). Catalogues confinement families, Rider/Bremsstrahlung limits and proposed loopholes, company and lab programs, a zeroth-order diligence scorecard, digital-twin tooling, patents, and ranked plant-odds. Readable PDF: zenodo.pdf. Source manuscript and build scripts: https://github.com/catskillsresearch/pb11_fusion_soa_2026
notes: Primary readable artifact is zenodo.pdf. Markdown source is arxiv.md in the linked GitHub repository. This work was prepared with LLM assistance; verify before scientific or policy use.
